title: Deal Or No Deal
description: A fully interactive Deal or No Deal Minecraft minigame plugin for server events and casinos.
body:
# 🎰 Deal or No Deal - Bring the Thrill of the Show to Your Minecraft Server!

This unique plugin recreates the exciting atmosphere of the world-renowned **"Deal or No Deal"** TV show directly in your Minecraft world.

Get ready for tense moments, strategic decisions, and the chance to win big rewards!

---

# ⭐ Key Features

### 🎮 Authentic Gameplay Experience
Feel the suspense as you choose your **initial box** and open others to eliminate values from the game board.

### 📞 Banker's Offers
Face the cunning **banker** who can make offers such as money, valuable items, or even a box swap.

Offers are handled through an **interactive GUI**, giving the game a smoother and more immersive experience.

### 🎁 Diverse Rewards
Easily configure what types of rewards can be part of the game:

| Reward Type | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| Economy Money | Gives players in-game currency |
| Items | Gives items directly to the player's inventory |

All rewards can be configured inside:

```yml
rewards.yml
```

### 📦 Interactive Boxes and Holograms
Set up **up to 24 boxes** and bring them to life with dynamic holograms displaying:

- Box numbers
- Revealed values

### ⚙️ Full Administrative Control
Administrators have complete control over the game and box configuration.

### 🌍 Multi-Language Support
The plugin supports multiple languages so players from around the world can enjoy the game in their native language.

Included by default:

| Language | Code |
|----------|------|
| English | `en` |
| Bulgarian | `bg` |
| Russian | `ru` |
| Spanish | `es` |

### 🛠 Easy Configuration
Customize game rules and rewards through simple configuration files:

- `config.yml`
- `rewards.yml`

---

# 🧩 Core Commands

Permissions:

- `dealornodeal.player` → Player commands
- `dealornodeal.admin` → Administrator commands

## General Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/dond help` | Displays a list of all available commands and their descriptions |
| `/dond info` | Shows the current game status |
| `/dond language set <lang_code>` | Sets the plugin language |
| `/dond language list` | Displays available languages |

## Admin Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/dond start <player>` | Starts a new "Deal or No Deal" game with the specified player |
| `/dond stop` | Force-stops the current game |
| `/dond offer <type> [value]` | Sends a banker's offer to the current player through the GUI |
| `/dond reload` | Reloads the plugin configuration |

### Offer Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `money` | Sends a money offer |
| `item` | Sends an item reward |
| `swap` | Offers a box swap |

Examples:

```bash
/dond offer money 1000
/dond offer item diamond 64
/dond offer swap
```

---

# 🛠 Box Setup Commands (Admin Only)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/dond edit box` | Enters box editing mode where you can right-click blocks to set them as box locations |
| `/dond edit clearboxes` | Clears all saved box locations |
| `/dond edit listboxes` | Lists all saved box locations |
| `/dond edit spawnnums` | Spawns box number holograms above each configured box (outside of a game) |
| `/dond edit removenums` | Removes all box number holograms |

---

# 🎲 Deal or No Deal

Get ready to test your luck and nerves in **Deal or No Deal** — where every decision can change your destiny!

Every box hides a secret.  
Every offer changes the game.  
Every decision could make you rich.

**Deal… or No Deal?**
